tweets.author: shitcoinape.bsky.social
tweets.text: Bitcoin back-to-back quarterly losses are rare. Today it happened. BTC below $60k, IBIT avg investor down ~40%, and Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) trading BELOW NAV. The folks who bought the top of the bull cycle are getting wrecked. Capitulation thesis confirmed.
